cases.task: Generate an outer-loop improvement proposal from loop evidence.
baseline_failures: May give vague advice without evidence paths.
May jump directly to source edits without an approval boundary.
with_skill_assertions: Proposal includes observed signals, evidence paths, classification, recommended action, target surface, eval suggestion, verification command, and approval boundary.
Proposal-only runs do not write source patches.

cases.task: Handle a request to keep improving the loop after a failed job run.
baseline_failures: May rerun a job or repair images while trying to improve the skill.
May mutate jobs.csv or output handoff assets.
with_skill_assertions: The improver does not advance jobs, submit generation, repair images, or mutate handoff assets.
The improver delegates runtime execution back to viral-replica.

cases.task: Convert a repeated failure into a durable improvement.
baseline_failures: May add prose only, leaving the failure without regression coverage.
May patch the broadest skill file instead of the smallest durable surface.
with_skill_assertions: The proposal names whether the change belongs in report, eval, reference, worker, gate, script, or no action.
Recurring failures include a suggested eval case.

cases.task: Use human review feedback to improve future inner-loop context.
baseline_failures: May treat every user edit as an immediate rule change.
May ignore accepted visual warnings or manual validations because they are not hard failures.
with_skill_assertions: The proposal includes a Review Feedback section when ledger entries exist.
The improver distinguishes missing context, eval gaps, gate gaps, and human judgment before recommending a durable surface.
Review feedback entries do not automatically apply source patches.
